title: June 29
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 29''' is the 180th day of the year (181st in leap years), with 185 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1935|1935]] – [[Derek Partridge]] is born.
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Michael Carter]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Greg Burson]] is born.
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Jeff Coopwood]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Michael Atiyeh]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Matthew Mercer]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 2|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 2]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 106|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 106]] published.
*[[1999]] – [[Declan Mulholland]] dies.
*[[2004]] – ''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' is published.
*[[2005]] – [[Empire 32|''Empire'' 32]] is published.
*[[2016]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 22|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 22]] is published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 19|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 19]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2018]] – [[Bong Dazo]] dies.
*[[2021]] – ''[[The High Republic: The Rising Storm]]'' published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic: The Rising Storm (audiobook)|''The High Republic: The Rising Storm'' audiobook]] released.
*2021 – ''[[The High Republic: Race to Crashpoint Tower]]'' published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic: Race to Crashpoint Tower (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Race to Crashpoint Tower'' audiobook]] released.
*2021 – ''[[The High Republic: Light of the Jedi]]'' published in paperback.
*[[2022]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 24|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 24]] published.
*2022 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 21|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 21]] published.
*2022 – [[Han Solo & Chewbacca 3|''Han Solo & Chewbacca'' 3]] published.
*2022 – [[Obi-Wan 2|''Obi-Wan'' 2]] published.
